AssetSpec.description:
Spec for `kind: Asset`. The core resource: declares desired state and convergence operations.
`on_drift` pairs conditions with sync operations. Entries are evaluated in order (first-match).

autoSync.description: Controls automatic sync execution in `nagi serve`. Defaults to `true`.

connection.description: Name of the Connection resource for DB access.

evaluateCacheTtl.description:
Default evaluate cache TTL for all conditions in this Asset.
Conditions can override this with their own `evaluateCacheTtl`.

onDrift.description:
Condition-sync pairs evaluated in order. First entry whose conditions detect drift
determines which sync to run. When omitted, the Asset is always Ready.

ConditionsSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Conditions`. A reusable set of conditions referenced from Asset `onDrift` entries.

ConnectionSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Connection`. Holds external data connection info referenced by Assets.

dbtCloud.description: Optional dbt Cloud configuration for running-job checks before sync.

profilesDir.description: Directory containing profiles.yml. If omitted, uses `~/.dbt/`.

target.description: If omitted, the default target in profiles.yml is used.

executionProject.description: GCP project ID used for query execution billing. Defaults to `project` if omitted.

keyfile.description: Path to the service account JSON key file. Required when `method` is `service-account`.

method.description: Authentication method. `oauth` (Application Default Credentials) or `service-account`. Defaults to `oauth`.

project.description: GCP project ID that contains the dataset.

path.description: Path to the DuckDB database file.

oneOf.description: Snowflake SQL REST API connection with Key-Pair JWT authentication.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to the RSA private key file (PKCS#8 PEM format) for JWT authentication.

role.description: Role to use for the session. Uses the user's default role if omitted.

CronSchedule.description: A cron expression in standard 5-field format (e.g. "0 3 * * *").

DbtCloudSpec.description: dbt Cloud configuration for pre-sync running-job checks.

credentialsFile.description: Path to the dbt Cloud credentials file. Defaults to `~/.dbt/dbt_cloud.yml`.

DefaultSync.description: Override for the auto-generated Sync. Same interface as `onDrift` entries (sync name + with).

sync.description: Name of the user-defined Sync resource to use instead of the auto-generated one.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync and Conditions resources for argument interpolation.

DesiredCondition.description:
A single desired state condition. The Asset is Ready only when all conditions are satisfied.
Each condition carries a `name` that is unique within the Asset (after Conditions expansion)
and used as a key in execution logs.

oneOf.description: Can transition to Not Ready as time passes beyond `maxAge`.

checkAt.description: Optional cron expression for additional evaluation at a specific time.

column.description: If omitted, freshness is determined from table metadata instead of a column value.

evaluateCacheTtl.description: Per-condition cache TTL override. Takes precedence over the Asset-level default.

interval.description: Polling interval for re-evaluating this condition.

maxAge.description: Maximum acceptable age of the data before the condition becomes Not Ready.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

oneOf.description: Query must return a scalar boolean. Ready when the result is true.

evaluateCacheTtl.description: Per-condition cache TTL override. Takes precedence over the Asset-level default.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

query.description: SQL query that must return a scalar boolean.

oneOf.description:
Runs an external command. Ready when the process exits with code 0.
`run` is argv: the first element is the program, the rest are arguments.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the subprocess.

evaluateCacheTtl.description: Per-condition cache TTL override. Takes precedence over the Asset-level default.

interval.description: Optional polling interval. If omitted, only evaluated on upstream state change or after sync.

name.description: Unique identifier for this condition within the Asset.

run.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

MergePosition.description:
Controls where an overlay onDrift entry is placed relative to Origin-generated entries
during Asset overlay merge.

Metadata.description: Common metadata shared by all resource kinds.

annotations.description: Non-identifying metadata for descriptions, owner contacts, or other arbitrary information.

labels.description: Key-value pairs for filtering with `--select label:key` or `--select label:key=value`.

OnDriftEntry.description:
An entry in `on_drift`. Pairs a Conditions reference with a Sync reference.
The conditions are evaluated as a group (all must pass for no drift).

conditions.description: Name of the `kind: Conditions` resource whose conditions define drift.

mergePosition.description: Controls insertion position during overlay merge. Not included in compiled output.

sync.description: Name of the Sync resource to execute when drift is detected.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync and Conditions resources for argument interpolation.

OriginSpec.description: Spec for `kind: Origin`. References an external project (e.g. dbt) to auto-generate Assets.

autoSync.description: Override `autoSync` for all auto-generated Assets. When `None`, each Asset uses its own default (`true`).

connection.description: Connection resource name for auto-generated Assets.

defaultSync.description:
User-defined Sync to override the auto-generated Sync
(e.g. `my-project-dbt-run` for Origin named `my-project`).

projectDir.description: Local path to the dbt project directory (relative or absolute).

SyncSpec.description:
Spec for `kind: Sync`. Defines convergence operations as a pre/run/post sequence of steps.
Reusable across multiple Assets via `ref`.

post.description: Optional step executed after the main sync command.

pre.description: Optional step executed before the main sync command.

args.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the subprocess.

type.description: Execution type for this step (currently only `Command`).

description:
A Nagi resource. Dispatched by the `kind` field in YAML, following the Kubernetes CRD convention.
Includes `apiVersion` to ensure the same YAML works in CLI, `nagi serve`, and future k8s environments.
title: NagiKind
